/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_convert_rcutils_ret_to_rmw_ret.dir/test_convert_rcutils_ret_to_rmw_ret.cpp.o -o test_convert_rcutils_ret_to_rmw_ret  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rmw:/root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib ../gmock/libgmock_main.a ../gmock/libgmock.a ../librmw.so -pthread /root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
